name: Puzzle Path
author: Poki
description: Puzzle Path is a nice puzzle game where you have to cut the terrain in the right way in order to continue driving! Take your scissors and make the cut that fits the hole in the ground. Some puzzles need multiple puzzles to complete. Drive through all the levels and become the best Puzzle Path player! Controls: Cut - mouse click About the creator: Puzzle Path was created by KasSanity. Other games by KasSanity are Twirl , Color Crash and Spin Escape !
